experiences.role: Backend-Focused Full Stack Developer (S3 Library Platform)
description: Built a SaaS platform focused on solving operational issues in library management and subscription workflows.
Handled complete product development including backend APIs, frontend integration, database structure, and deployment workflows independently.
Developed features for subscriptions, seat management, attendance tracking, authentication, and admin operations.
Validated the product through direct discussions with libraries and iterative feature improvements based on real feedback.
Identified real-world adoption challenges including operational habits, trust barriers, and workflow expectations.
Strengthened practical understanding of product validation, workflow design, and maintainable system development.
Worked on backend systems for SaaS applications using Node.js and Express.js.
Built REST APIs for subscriptions, billing, inventory, and workflow-driven business modules.
Integrated payment gateways including Stripe and Razorpay with secure webhook handling.
Worked with MongoDB and MySQL for database design, query handling, and backend workflows.
Collaborated with frontend developers and product teams for feature integration and API implementation.
Focused on maintainable backend structure, performance improvements, and reliable system behavior.
Supported backend API development, debugging, and testing in a production-oriented environment.
Worked with Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and Postman while learning backend development workflows.
Assisted in implementing backend logic and API integrations based on project requirements.
Built foundational skills in backend architecture, debugging, and collaborative development practices.
